prompt: A glossy Japanese anime magazine cover for a fictional next-generation AI idol magazine, packed edge to edge with bold cover lines and neon cosmic energy. The main masthead is huge serif lettering reading "YUMEKAIRO" across the top in white with a purple glow, with a small pink banner near the top right reading "ゆめかいろマガジン". At the very top, add a slogan in Japanese: "夢がカラフルに動き出す！次世代AIアイドルマガジン". Feature 2 full-body anime girls standing together in the center, holding hands and smiling confidently at the viewer. The left girl has deep navy blue very long wavy twin-tail hair with star hair clips, large blue-green eyes, a black choker with a gold bow and star charm, an off-shoulder white frilled crop top, dark denim short shorts with a white belt and gold star accessories, black garter straps, galaxy-gradient thigh-high stockings in purple and blue with tiny stars, and white sneakers. The right girl has very long silver-lilac hair, soft teal eyes, futuristic over-ear headphones with glowing accents, an oversized white and lavender hoodie draped off the shoulders, a ribbed gray turtleneck mini dress with side cutout, white thigh-high stockings with lavender stripe markings on one leg, chunky purple sneakers, and a long purple strap accessory with a ring pendant. Give both girls a polished modern VTuber idol aesthetic, slim proportions, youthful faces, gentle blush, crisp cel shading, luminous highlights, and highly detailed fabric folds and accessories. The background is a vivid dreamy space scene with purple, pink, and electric blue nebula swirls, stars, sparkles, light streaks, and glossy magical gradients. Arrange many Japanese magazine cover callouts around the characters in loud, layered typography with white, yellow, cyan, pink, and black text blocks, including exactly 11 major cover lines: "ゆめみなな！100の質問", "ゆめかいろ一期生オーディション", "VTuber EXPO 2026 出展", "AI×アイドルの最前線", "人とAIがつなぐ “夢の回路”", "推す理由", "独占キャッチ", "完全密着", "月窓ろみ デビュー！", "神回連発！名シーン まとめ", "配信裏話 ついに見せた “本気の素顔”", plus a giant playful headline at the lower right reading "かわいすぎ 注意報". In the top right corner, include a publication info block with "発行日 2026/4/29", price "¥777", and publisher text "ゆめかいろ出版". Put a realistic barcode at the bottom right with the digits "4 595315 007777" and along the bottom left add the website and social handle: "https://www.yumekairo.jp" and "@yumekairo_ent". Make it look like a premium commercial manga/anime magazine cover, extremely vibrant, high contrast, dense layout, polished print design, sharp focus, and stylish idol branding.
